title: Treated Wastewater Use for Fertigation: A Distance-Based and Sodium-Constrained Deterministic Allocation Model in the Semi-Arid Region of Minas Gerais, Brazil
description: SpeakForWater Episode 2: Treated Wastewater Use for Fertigation: A Distance-Based and Sodium-Constrained Deterministic Allocation Model in the Semi-Arid Region of Minas Gerais, Brazil. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
